name: game_date
description: Game date (partition key)

name: player_lookup
description: Normalized player lookup key

name: game_id
description: NBA game identifier

name: system_id
description: Model system_id that generated the prediction

name: source_pipeline
description: Which model pipeline produced this candidate

name: source_model_family
description: Model family classification (v9_mae, v12_noveg, etc.)

name: player_name
description: Player display name

name: team_abbr
description: Player team tricode

name: opponent_team_abbr
description: Opponent team tricode

name: predicted_points
description: Model predicted points

name: line_value
description: Vegas line at pick time

name: recommendation
description: OVER or UNDER

name: edge
description: Absolute edge: |predicted_points - line_value|

name: confidence_score
description: Model confidence score

name: composite_score
description: Aggregator-computed rank score (edge + signal quality weighting)

name: signal_count
description: Total signals fired for this pick

name: real_signal_count
description: Non-base, non-shadow signal count

name: signal_tags
description: List of all fired signal names

name: signal_rescued
description: Whether admitted via rescue pathway

name: rescue_signal
description: Which signal rescued this pick

name: model_hr_weight
description: Model HR weight used in scoring

name: pipeline_hr_21d
description: Model pipeline HR (21d rolling) at time of pick

name: pipeline_hr_source
description: Source of pipeline HR: pipeline, bb_legacy, or raw_fallback

name: feature_quality_score
description: Feature store quality score (0-1)

name: combo_classification
description: Matched combo pattern from combo registry

name: combo_hit_rate
description: Historical combo HR

name: rank_in_pipeline
description: Rank within source model pipeline (before merge)

name: qualifying_subsets
description: Dynamic subsets this pick qualifies for (JSON array)

name: was_selected
description: TRUE if survived merge into final best bets

name: selection_reason
description: Why selected or dropped: selected, player_dedup, team_cap, volume_cap, rescue_cap

name: merge_rank
description: Final rank in merged output (NULL if not selected)

name: pipeline_agreement_count
description: How many model pipelines nominated this player

name: pipeline_agreement_models
description: JSON array of pipeline system_ids that nominated this player

name: direction_conflict_count
description: How many pipelines disagreed on direction for this player

name: filters_passed
description: JSON array of filters this pick survived

name: filters_failed
description: JSON array of filters that blocked this pick

name: observation_flags
description: JSON array of observation filters that fired but did not block

name: player_line_tier
description: bench/role/starter/star based on line value

name: home_away
description: HOME or AWAY

name: spread
description: Game spread at pick time

name: over_rate_last_10
description: Player over rate in last 10 games

name: is_back_to_back
description: Whether this is a back-to-back game

name: star_teammates_out
description: Number of star teammates missing

name: algorithm_version
description: Algorithm version that produced this candidate (e.g., v443_per_model_pipelines)

name: created_at
description: When this record was created
